summary: Reordered the opening to enter through the sub-collection's physical space before the translation snag, which separates it from chapter 6's problem-first opening while preserving the same scene. Added a closing beat that carries the Great Hall's altered pressure out into the corridor so the chapter exits in the destabilized state that feeds the next chapter.
edits: Shifted the opening paragraph to begin with Gavin in the sub-collection rather than with the failed approximation, preserving the same information with a different entry scaffold.
Added a final sentence noting that the Hall's pressure follows Gavin into the corridor to tighten the handoff into his continued altered perception.
